channel.title: Game Theory on OranLooney.com
channel.description: Recent content in Game Theory on OranLooney.com

item.title: Why the Monty Hall Problem Drives People Crazy
item.description: This essay isn’t to explain the solution to the Monty Hall problem—you can look that up anywhere—but to ask a related question: why does it seem to drive some people crazy? Why do they get so attached to their wrong answers, and so upset by the correct answer? That’s weird, right?

item.title: Modeling Cycles of Grift with Evolutionary Game Theory
item.description: We are in a golden age of grift. Where adventurers once flocked to California or the Yukon because “there was gold in them thar hills,” the fastest way to get rich today is by fleecing suckers. We’ve got crypto rug pulls, meme stocks, nutritional supplements, MLMs—anything to make a quick buck.
